sentences.target: Ich muss heute einen Bericht erstellen.

translations.de: Ich muss heute einen Bericht erstellen.
translations.en: I have to create a report today.
translations.es: Hoy tengo que hacer un informe.
translations.fr: Je dois rédiger un rapport aujourd'hui.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi phải viết báo cáo.
translations.nl: Ik moet vandaag een rapport schrijven.
translations.hu: Ma meg kell írnom egy jelentést.
translations.hi: मुझे आज एक रिपोर्ट तैयार करनी है.
translations.el: Πρέπει σήμερα να ετοιμάσω μια αναφορά.
translations.nb: Jeg må skrive en rapport i dag.
translations.id: Saya harus membuat laporan hari ini.
translations.sv: Jag måste skriva en rapport idag.
translations.ro: Trebuie să scriu un raport azi.
translations.da: Jeg skal skrive en rapport i dag.
translations.ja: 今日はレポートを作らないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary in present tense (1st sg), expressing obligation; selects a bare infinitive complement.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause, indicating the time of the action.
Indefinite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Bericht'.
Common noun, masculine singular accusative; direct object of 'erstellen'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'muss'.

sentences.target: Man kann online schnell ein Konto erstellen.
sentences.reading: /man kan ˈɔnlaɪ̯n ʃnɛl aɪ̯n ˈkɔnto ɛɐ̯ˈʃtɛlən/

translations.de: Man kann online schnell ein Konto erstellen.
translations.ipa: /man kan ˈɔnlaɪ̯n ʃnɛl aɪ̯n ˈkɔnto ɛɐ̯ˈʃtɛlən/
translations.en: You can quickly create an account online.
translations.es: Puedes crear una cuenta en línea rápidamente.
translations.fr: On peut créer un compte en ligne rapidement.
translations.it: Puoi creare un account online rapidamente.
translations.ko: 온라인에서 계정을 빠르게 만들 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以很快在网上创建账号。
translations.yue: 喺網上好快就可以開個帳戶。
translations.ru: Можно быстро создать аккаунт в интернете.
translations.pt: Você pode criar uma conta online rapidamente.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể nhanh chóng tạo tài khoản trực tuyến.
translations.ar: يمكنك إنشاء حساب عبر الإنترنت بسرعة.
translations.nl: Je kunt online snel een account aanmaken.
translations.uk: Можна швидко створити обліковий запис онлайн.
translations.hi: आप ऑनलाइन जल्दी से खाता बना सकते हैं.
translations.pl: Można szybko założyć konto w internecie.
translations.el: Μπορείς να δημιουργήσεις γρήγορα έναν λογαριασμό στο διαδίκτυο.
translations.nb: Du kan raskt opprette en konto på nettet.
translations.id: Kamu bisa dengan cepat membuat akun secara online.
translations.sv: Du kan snabbt skapa ett konto online.
translations.ro: Poți să creezi rapid un cont online.
translations.da: Du kan hurtigt oprette en konto online.
translations.ja: オンラインで素早くアカウントを作成できます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal pronoun functioning as subject (3rd person singular).
Modal auxiliary in present tense (3rd sg), expressing possibility/ability; selects a bare infinitive.
Adverb indicating medium (via the internet); modifies the predicate.
Manner adverb; specifies the speed of the action.
Indefinite article, neuter singular (form identical in nom/acc); determiner of 'Konto' (object).
Common noun, neuter singular accusative; direct object of 'erstellen'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'kann'.

sentences.target: Der Kunde lässt gerade ein Angebot erstellen.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈkʊndə lɛst ɡəˈʁaːdə aɪ̯n ˈaŋɡəboːt ɛɐ̯ˈʃtɛlən/

translations.de: Der Kunde lässt gerade ein Angebot erstellen.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈkʊndə lɛst ɡəˈʁaːdə aɪ̯n ˈaŋɡəboːt ɛɐ̯ˈʃtɛlən/
translations.en: The customer is getting a quote made right now.
translations.es: Al cliente le están preparando un presupuesto ahora.
translations.fr: Le client se fait faire un devis en ce moment.
translations.it: Il cliente si sta facendo fare un preventivo adesso.
translations.pt: O cliente está pedindo um orçamento agora.
translations.vi: Khách hàng đang nhận báo giá ngay bây giờ.
translations.nl: De klant laat op dit moment een offerte maken.
translations.hu: Az ügyfélnek éppen készítik az árajánlatot.
translations.hi: ग्राहक अभी कोटेशन बनवा रहा है.
translations.nb: Kunden får laget et tilbud nå.
translations.sv: Kunden får en offert just nu.
translations.cs: Zákazník si právě nechává udělat nabídku.
translations.da: Kunden får lavet et tilbud lige nu.
translations.ja: お客さんは今、見積もりを作ってもらっているところです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; determiner of 'Kunde'.
Common noun, masculine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Causative auxiliary in present tense (3rd sg); takes a bare infinitive ('erstellen') indicating an action performed by someone else.
Temporal/focus adverb; indicates the action is happening right now.
Indefinite article, neuter singular; determiner of 'Angebot' (object of the embedded verb).
Common noun, neuter singular accusative; direct object of the embedded verb 'erstellen' in the causative construction.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the causative auxiliary 'lässt'.

sentences.target: Er will für morgen eine Präsentation erstellen.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ vɪl fyːɐ̯ ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ˈaɪ̯nə pʁɛzɛntaˈtsjoːn ɛɐ̯ˈʃtɛlən/

translations.de: Er will für morgen eine Präsentation erstellen.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ vɪl fyːɐ̯ ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ˈaɪ̯nə pʁɛzɛntaˈtsjoːn ɛɐ̯ˈʃtɛlən/
translations.en: He wants to create a presentation for tomorrow.
translations.es: Quiere preparar una presentación para mañana.
translations.fr: Il veut préparer une présentation pour demain.
translations.it: Vuole preparare una presentazione per domani.
translations.ko: 그는 내일 발표할 자료를 만들고 싶어 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他想为明天做一个演示文稿。
translations.yue: 佢想準備一個明日用嘅簡報。
translations.ru: Он хочет подготовить презентацию на завтра.
translations.pt: Ele quer preparar uma apresentação para amanhã.
translations.vi: Anh ấy muốn chuẩn bị một bài thuyết trình cho ngày mai.
translations.nl: Hij wil een presentatie voor morgen maken.
translations.uk: Він хоче підготувати презентацію на завтра.
translations.hi: वह कल के लिए एक प्रस्तुति तैयार करना चाहता है.
translations.el: Θέλει να ετοιμάσει μια παρουσίαση για αύριο.
translations.nb: Han vil lage en presentasjon til i morgen.
translations.id: Dia ingin membuat presentasi untuk besok.
translations.sv: Han vill göra en presentation till i morgon.
translations.ro: Vrea să pregătească o prezentare pentru mâine.
translations.da: Han vil lave en præsentation til i morgen.
translations.ja: 彼は明日用のプレゼンを作りたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary in present tense (3rd sg), expressing volition; selects a bare infinitive.
Preposition forming a prepositional phrase; marks a time frame.
Temporal adverb used as the complement of 'für' to indicate the deadline/time.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Präsentation'.
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of 'erstellen'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'will'.
